verses.text: All peoples are called to clap and shout, for 'the LORD most high is... a great King over all the earth.' His reign is universal. The proper response to God's kingship is joyful, wholehearted praise.
All peoples are called to clap and shout, for 'the LORD most high is... a great King over all the earth.' His reign is universal. The proper response to God's kingship is joyful, wholehearted praise.
He subdues nations under His people and chooses their inheritance for them. He governs their lot in love. What God appoints for His own is wiser than anything they could choose.
He subdues nations under His people and chooses their inheritance for them. He governs their lot in love. What God appoints for His own is wiser than anything they could choose.
'God is gone up with a shout,' enthroned amid praise; 'sing praises with understanding.' The ascending King is hailed with joy. This pictures Christ's triumphant ascension to His throne.
'God is gone up with a shout,' enthroned amid praise; 'sing praises with understanding.' The ascending King is hailed with joy. This pictures Christ's triumphant ascension to His throne.
'God is gone up with a shout,' enthroned amid praise; 'sing praises with understanding.' The ascending King is hailed with joy. This pictures Christ's triumphant ascension to His throne.
God reigns over the heathen, and the princes of the earth, the 'shields' of the world, belong to Him. All authority is His. The rulers of the nations are but His servants, subject to His throne.
